findings.body: findings_status was resolved while coderabbit_verdict was blocker and source_drift_status was stale, making local repair versus pending verification ambiguous.
findings.disposition: Repaired by using findings_status locally_resolved_pending_refresh, preserving coderabbit_verdict blocker, and marking source_drift_status stale until CodeRabbit refreshes the repaired source.

findings.body: trigger_thresholds includes repeated_retry_count without a matching abnormal_run_triggers entry or normalized trigger mapping.
findings.disposition: Repaired by adding repeated_retry to abnormal_run_triggers so repeated_retry_count has an explicit matching trigger.

findings.body: validateRecurringPaidRoutes and validateSoftBudgetBands still substitute unknown for missing ids instead of rejecting missing or empty ids.
findings.disposition: Repaired by requiring non-empty string ids for recurring_paid_routes and soft_budget_bands, with focused regression tests.

findings.body: REQUIRED_PROVIDER_PRICING_FIELDS omits required provider and model_or_profile keys, so policy entries missing those fields can pass validation.
findings.disposition: Repaired by requiring provider and model_or_profile in provider-pricing evidence, with focused regression tests.
